channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: McIlroy and Lowry come up aces, Scheffler back with a 67 and Henley takes Pebble Beach lead
item.description: Scottie Scheffler looked every bit like the No. 1 player in the world even if he didn't make a hole-in-one during the exciting start to the AT&T Pebble Beach Pro-Am.
item.dc:creator: Doug Ferguson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: A Lim Kim opens 4-shot lead in 1st round of LPGA season opener
item.description: A Lim Kim shot a bogey-free, 7-under 65 to take a four-shot lead in the opening round of the Hilton Grand Vacations Tournament of Champions, the LGPA Tour season opener.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Unusual betting patterns surrounding play of Terry Rozier in 2023 game with Charlotte investigated
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Unusual betting patterns surrounding the play of then-Charlotte Hornets guard Terry Rozier in a game nearly two years ago are now under investigation by federal prosecutors, part of the same probe that led to the lifetime ban of Toronto Raptors player Jontay Porter, the NBA confirmed Th
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Emotions pour from tight-knit skating community following DC plane crash carrying athletes, coaches
item.description: The tight-knit figure skating community was rocked Wednesday when an American Airlines flight carrying athletes, parents and coaches from a development camp in Wichita, Kansas, collided with an Army helicopter and crashed into the Potomac River.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL says it will look into allegations by massage therapists about Justin Tucker's behavior
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — The NFL will look into allegations that Baltimore Ravens kicker Justin Tucker behaved inappropriately toward massage therapists at four spas and wellness centers in the Baltimore area, a league spokesman said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: World champion Russian skaters on American Airlines jet built a new life as coaches in the US
item.description: TALLINN, Estonia (AP) — The two Russian figure skating coaches killed in the American Airlines crash were two-time Olympians and former world champions in the pairs event. They were also a married couple with a son who finished fourth last week at the U.S. national championships in Wichita, Kansas.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Plane crashes in sports have devastated pro teams and college programs
item.description: The crash of an American Airlines jet that collided with an Army helicopter was the latest to strike the sports world in the U.S. and globally. Among the passengers were several members of the Skating Club of Boston who were returning from the U.S. Figure Skating Championships in Wichita, Kansas.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Porzingis hits eight 3s, scores 34 as Bulls open 3-game road trip with blowout loss in Boston
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Kristaps Porzingis scored 26 of his season-high 34 points in the first half Wednesday night, and the Boston Celtics coasted to a 122-100 victory over the Bulls in the first game of Chicago's three-game road trip.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: IOC presidential candidates pitch to Olympic voters in quirky closed-door event
item.description: LAUSANNE, Switzerland (AP) — Behind closed doors, seven candidates hoping to lead the International Olympic Committee made key pitches on Thursday to about 100 voters in perhaps the most elusive and opaque election in world sports.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Super Bowl champion hopes fans appreciate Chiefs' greatness, not hate on it
item.description: Clay Matthews was only able to win one Super Bowl with arguably the most talented quarterback ever. Maybe that's why he's able to appreciate the Chiefs' greatness.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Broncos to supply helmets to every Colorado high school tackle football team
item.description: The Broncos have partnered with a football equipment company and the Colorado High School Activities Association to supply more than 15,000 brand-new Riddell Axiom helmets.
item.dc:creator: Spencer Kristensen, NewsNation

item.title: Florida coach Todd Golden cleared in Title IX investigation regarding stalking allegations
item.description: The University of Florida has cleared men's basketball coach Todd Golden following a four-month Title IX investigation into allegations of sexual exploitation, sexual harassment and stalking.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Kieron van Wyk, 23, first amateur to win APGA Tour event at Farmers Invitational
item.description: Kieron van Wyk, a 23-year-old South African amateur golfer, made history as the first amateur to win an APGA Tour event at the Farmers Insurance Invitational in San Diego.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Taylor Swift watches boyfriend Travis Kelce and the Chiefs beat the Bills and get back to Super Bowl
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — You could say that Taylor Swift's championship era has reached its second consecutive season.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mahomes and the Chiefs will face Hurts, Barkley and the Eagles as they seek a Super Bowl three-peat
item.description: Patrick Mahomes, Travis Kelce and the Kansas City Chiefs are going for a three-peat in a Super Bowl rematch. This time, Jalen Hurts and the Philadelphia Eagles have Saquon Barkley. The Eagles and Chiefs will face off for the Lombardi Trophy for the second time in three years on Feb.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Kucherov scores in OT to give Lightning 4-3 win over Blackhawks
item.description: Nikita Kucherov scored 58 seconds into overtime and had two assists as the Tampa Bay Lightning beat the Chicago Blackhawks 4-3 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: SZA to join Kendrick Lamar for Super Bowl LIX halftime show
item.description: Apple Music released a teaser trailer on Thursday showing the Compton native on the gridiron, assessing the field before the big game while he's talking to someone on the phone.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, Fox 5

item.title: L.A.'s Genesis Invitational will be held at Torrey Pines due to fires
item.description: After several major fires erupted in Los Angeles earlier this month, the 2025 Genesis Invitational scheduled for next month has been moved to Torrey Pines Golf Course, the PGA Tour confirmed in a social media post Friday morning.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5
